error_signature: An HTTPS URL must be provided for webhook
title: Telegram Trigger requires HTTPS URL
symptom: When trying to activate the Telegram Trigger node, n8n throws 'An HTTPS URL must be provided for webhook' error, despite using ngrok.
not_this_if: n8n is running in a production environment
root_cause: The error occurs because n8n needs to be explicitly told to use the ngrok URL as the webhook URL. If n8n is not started with the correct environment variable, it defaults to a non-HTTPS URL.
fix_steps: Set the environment variable WEBHOOK_URL to your ngrok HTTPS URL
Start n8n using the command 'n8n start' with the environment variable set
agent_instruction: Start n8n with the command 'WEBHOOK_URL=your_ngrok_https_url n8n start'.
